finding.message: missing: Session idea (expected `💡`), Previous-session review (expected `previous-session review`), Model line (expected `📊 Model:`)

⚑ needs-owner carries asks without the OWNER-ACTION fields (missing: WHAT, WHERE, HOW, WHY-IT-MATTERS, UNBLOCKS, VERIFIED-NEEDED) — the owner is the scarcest resource: structure each ask per control/README.md § OWNER-ACTION format (attempt it yourself or cite the exact wall — VERIFIED-NEEDED; assumption-based asks are banned), and withdraw stale asks.
